name: Souffle Grand Marnier
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk and butter to a boiling point.
2. Mix egg yolks and sugar.
3. Add flour, mixing thoroughly.
4. Gradually add hot milk mixture to the egg yolk mixture.
5. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened but do not let boil.
6. Remove from heat and add Grand Marnier.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the yolk-milk mixture.
9. Pour the batter into a buttered 2-quart souffle dish.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30-35 minutes and serve immediately.
